children.name: spec
children.summary: Define what: goal, user stories, edge cases, BDD acceptance criteria.
route_when: No spec.md exists for the active workstream
avoid_when: spec.md already exists and needs planning

children.name: plan
children.summary: Design how: architecture, API schemas, DB model, impact analysis, test strategy.
avoid_when: plan.md already exists and needs task breakdown

children.name: tasks
children.summary: Break plan into minimal verifiable tasks with 5-dimension verification metadata.
avoid_when: tasks.md already exists and needs implementation

children.name: implement
children.summary: TDD implementation per task. Each task passes before next. Produces handoff.md.
route_when: Retry after QA Layer 1 (code) rework with attempts remaining
avoid_when: handoff.md already exists and needs QA

children.name: qa
children.summary: Independently verify against SPEC acceptance criteria. Generator ≠ Auditor.
avoid_when: qa-report.md exists with PASS verdict and needs release

children.name: release
children.summary: Write changelog, update reference docs, archive completed workstream.
avoid_when: changelog.md already exists and archive complete
